info.name: Zorvyn Finance API — E2E Tests
info.description:
# Zorvyn Finance API — End-to-End Test Suite

Run this collection using the **Postman Collection Runner** (or Newman CLI) to execute a full E2E test pass.

## How to Run

**Postman Desktop:**
1. Import this file
2. Click the collection → **Run Collection**
3. Select all requests → **Run Zorvyn Finance API — E2E Tests**

**Newman CLI:**
```bash
npm install -g newman
newman run Zorvyn_Finance_API_E2E_Tests.postman_collection.json --delay-request 200
```

## Test Structure
| Folder | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| ⚙️ Setup | Create admin + viewer accounts, login, seed data |
| ✅ Happy Path | Full CRUD flow with assertions on every field |
| 🚫 Edge Cases | 4xx error scenarios, RBAC, validation failures |
| 🧹 Teardown | Soft-delete seeded records, deactivate test viewer |

## Variables Auto-Set During Run
- `token` — admin JWT (set by Login)
- `viewer_token` — viewer JWT (set by Viewer Login)
- `record_id` — income record ID
- `record_id_2` — expense record ID
- `viewer_id` — ID of the viewer user

item.name: ⚙️ Setup
item.description: Creates test accounts and seeds initial data. Run these first — order matters.

exec: pm.test("[Register Admin] Has all required fields", () => {
pm.test("[Register Admin] First user gets admin role", () => {
pm.test("[Register Admin] No password in response", () => {
pm.test("[Register Viewer] Subsequent user gets viewer role", () => {
pm.test("[Login Admin] Token type is bearer", () => {
pm.test("[Login Admin] Token is a non-empty string", () => {

item.name: ✅ Happy Path
item.description: Full CRUD flow in sequential order. Each request validates response structure, business logic, and auto-chains IDs for subsequent steps.

exec: pm.test("[Create Record] Has all required fields", () => {
pm.test("[Create Record] is_deleted defaults to false", () => {
pm.test("[List Records] Items is an array", () => {
pm.test("[List Records] Contains at least 2 records (our seeded data)", () => {
pm.test("[List Records] Page matches requested page", () => {
pm.test("[List Records] No deleted records in default view", () => {
pm.test("[Filter by Type] All items are income type", () => {
pm.test("[Get Record] ID matches requested ID", () => {
pm.test("[Category Breakdown] Each item has required fields", () => {
pm.test("[Category Breakdown] total_amount is a number", () => {
pm.test("[Monthly Trends] Status 200 for admin", () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test("[Monthly Trends] Each entry has year, month, income, expense, net", () => {
pm.test("[Monthly Trends] net = income - expense for each month", () => {
pm.test("[My Profile] Email matches logged-in user", () => {
pm.test("[My Profile] No sensitive fields exposed", () => {
pm.test("[List Users] Returns at least 2 users", () => {
pm.test("[List Users] Each user has required fields", () => {
pm.test("[Update Role] Role is now analyst", () => {

item.name: 🚫 Edge Cases
item.description: All 4xx scenarios — RBAC violations, validation failures, duplicate data, missing fields, and bad IDs.

exec: pm.test("[Wrong Password] Error is generic (no account enumeration)", () => {
pm.test("[Unknown Email] Same generic error (no enumeration)", () => {
pm.test("[No Token] Not 403 — unauthenticated vs unauthorized", () => {
pm.test("[Invalid Type] Validation error on type field", () => {
pm.test("[Trends Viewer] Not a 401 (user IS authenticated)", () => {
pm.test("[include_deleted viewer] Not 422 — auth checked before validation", () => {

item.name: 🧹 Teardown
item.description: Cleans up seeded test data. Soft-deletes records and deactivates the viewer account.

exec: pm.test("[Verify Delete] Deleted records visible with flag", () => {
